25.reason: This condition only checks if the x-coordinates match, but does not verify that the y-coordinates also match (i.e., the segments share an endpoint). According to the problem, two segments are adjacent only if the endpoint of one exactly matches the start point of the other, which requires both x and y to be equal.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  This condition only checks if the x-coordinates match, but does not verify that the y-coordinates also match (i.e., the segments share an endpoint). According to the problem, two segments are adjacent only if the endpoint of one exactly matches the start point of the other, which requires both x and y to be equal.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  This condition only checks if the x-coordinates match, but does not verify that the y-coordinates also match (i.e., the segments share an endpoint). According to the problem, two segments are adjacent only if the endpoint of one exactly matches the start point of the other, including both x and y coordinates.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  missing check for y-coordinate equality (l[i].sty == l[now].edy)
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  Missing check for y-coordinate equality (l[i].sty == l[now].edy)
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The original code only checked if the x-coordinates matched (l[i].stx==l[now].edx), but ignored the y-coordinates. Two segments are connected only if they share the exact same endpoint (both x and y must match). This causes incorrect chaining of segments that align vertically but don't actually touch.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The original code only checked if the x-coordinates matched (l[i].stx==l[now].edx), but two segments are adjacent only if they share the exact same endpoint, meaning both x and y coordinates must match. Failing to check y causes incorrect connections between segments that align vertically or overlap in x-range but differ in y.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The adjacency check only compares x-coordinates of the endpoint; it must also compare y-coordinates to ensure the segments share the exact same endpoint.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The adjacency check is incomplete; it only compares x-coordinates of the next segment's start with current end, but ignores y-coordinate. Must check both x and y to ensure shared endpoint.]
